description: Eval set for Trivy container-based vulnerability/misconfiguration scanning skill

evals.prompt: I just built a new container image called 'my-app:latest' using podman. Can you scan it for critical vulnerabilities before I deploy it to production?
evals.expected_output: Runs trivy image scan against my-app:latest with severity CRITICAL,HIGH and exit-code 1 for pipeline gating. Uses podman socket mount.

evals.prompt: Our Node.js project has a package-lock.json. Can you check if any of our dependencies have known CVEs? I want a JSON report saved to trivy-report.json
evals.expected_output: Runs trivy filesystem scan on project directory with --scanners vuln, outputs JSON format, writes to trivy-report.json

evals.prompt: I need to scan my project's Dockerfile and Kubernetes manifests for security misconfigurations. Can you help?
evals.expected_output: Runs trivy filesystem scan with --scanners misconfig against project, checks Dockerfile and K8s YAML files for IaC misconfigurations

evals.prompt: We're required to produce an SBOM for our project for compliance. Can you generate a CycloneDX SBOM for our Node.js project?
evals.expected_output: Runs trivy filesystem scan with --format cyclonedx --output /src/sbom.cdx.json to generate CycloneDX SBOM document
